english: The student reads the book in the library.
spanish: El estudiante lee el libro en la biblioteca.

english: The teacher does not explain the rule today.
spanish: La profesora no explica la regla hoy.

english: Do they study in the city?
I know that he arrives early.

spanish: Los ninos estan jugando en el parque.

english: We bought the bread for dinner.
